entity.label: Bor-ashan
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Smoking furnace, one of the places where “David himself and his men were wont to haunt” (1 Sam. 30:30, 31). It is probably identical with Ashan (Josh. 15:42; 19:7), a Simeonite city in the Negeb, i.e., the south, belonging to Judah. The word ought, according to another reading, to be “Bor-ashan.”

verses.text: And to them which were in Hormah, and to them which were in Chorashan, and to them which were in Athach,
